title: Advisor Meeting Prep
guardrail: Do not imply suitability or personalized recommendation approval.
prompt_template: Prepare an advisor meeting brief for {profile_name}. Use the current proposal return {proposal_return_pct}% and alpha {proposal_alpha_pct}%. Cover objective, risk profile, model allocation rationale, questions to ask, and items requiring human review. Include this disclaimer: research-only, no personalized advice.

title: Model Proposal Draft
guardrail: State that this is an internal research proposal draft only.
prompt_template: Draft an internal model proposal for {profile_name}. Explain allocations: {allocations}. Explain policy warnings: {policy_warnings}. Use plain language and separate portfolio rationale from compliance limitations.

title: Portfolio Commentary
required_context: model basket performance, candidates, market context
guardrail: Do not market simulated results as live audited performance.
prompt_template: Write portfolio commentary for the AI Wealth platform from {from_date} to {to_date}. Mention top model baskets, underperforming models, risk-review candidates, and the need for human approval before external use.

title: Advisor Review Queue Triage
required_context: review queue, data flags, risk flags
guardrail: Data-review items must be resolved before external use.
prompt_template: Prioritize the advisor review queue. High priority tasks: {high_priority_tasks}. Medium priority tasks: {medium_priority_tasks}. Return actions, owner, evidence needed, and decision status.

title: Market Data Quality Review
required_context: data quality flags, tickers, price changes
guardrail: Do not approve candidates with unresolved split/bad-price flags.
prompt_template: Review data-quality issues for tickers: {data_review_tickers}. For each ticker, list likely issue, validation steps, whether it can remain in reports, and what evidence is required.

title: AI Marketing Compliance Review
required_context: marketing copy, AI claims, CSA guardrails
guardrail: Flag guaranteed-return, autonomous-advice, and unregistered-advice language.
prompt_template: Review AI wealth marketing language against these guardrails: {governance_checklist}. Rewrite claims to be CFA-led, human-supervised, AI-assisted, research-only, and not personalized advice.

title: Model Fact Sheet Generator
guardrail: Include methodology, assumptions, risks, and simulation limits.
prompt_template: Create a model fact sheet for {basket_name}. Include objective, benchmark, holdings count, return, alpha, risks, ideal policy profile, methodology, and simulation limitations.

title: Next Best Action Engine
guardrail: Actions are workflow tasks, not trade instructions.
prompt_template: Generate next-best actions for the AI Wealth advisor console using top candidates {top_candidates}, ready profiles {ready_profiles}, and review tasks {review_task_count}. Group actions by research, client workflow, supervision, and reporting.

title: Client Follow-Up Draft
trigger: After a meeting or proposal review
guardrail: Do not include specific investment recommendations unless reviewed by a registered advisor.
prompt_template: Draft a concise follow-up email for {profile_name}. Summarize discussion points, documents needed, model research under review, and next steps. Keep it educational and compliance-safe.

title: AI Governance Log Entry
prompt_template: Create a governance log entry for the AI Wealth run from {from_date} to {to_date}. Include data sources, generated outputs, unresolved review tasks, human reviewer fields, and publication decision.
